title: Grid SCADA access control

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

dataSources: Windows Security Event Logs, network infrastructure logs, OT/ICS system logs, power grid SCADA, petroleum control systems, government system audit trails, identity management systems, security incident reports
app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Windows (742), Splunk Add-on for Unix and Linux (833), Splunk OT Security Add-on (5151), Splunk ITSI (1841), Splunk Common Information Model Add-on (1621)
spl:
index=network sourcetype="pan:traffic" earliest=-24h
| eval src_zone=coalesce(src_zone,"IT-Unclassified"), dest_zone=coalesce(dest_zone,"Unknown")
| search src_zone="IT-Corporate" AND dest_zone="OT-SCADA" AND action="allow"
| lookup ot_segmentation_allowlist.csv src dest dest_port OUTPUT approved
| where isnull(approved) OR approved="false"
| stats sum(bytes) as bytes, values(app) as apps by src, dest, dest_port
| sort - bytes
value: Tracks jump-host and VPN sessions targeting SCADA enclaves for least-privilege and session integrity evidence.
implementation: (1) Maintain supporting lookups (classified hosts, sectors, transfers) aligned to Norwegian regulatory language. (2) Schedule searches with Europe/Oslo time semantics for reporting cutoffs. (3) Route ES notables to the correct national security, OT, or privacy queues. (4) Quarterly false-positive tuning with HR, operations, and legal stakeholders.
visualization: Bar chart (events by host), Table (top users), Single value (policy violations).
cimSpl: | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Authentication.Authentication by Authentication.src, Authentication.dest | sort - count

references.title: Splunk Add-on for Unix and Linux

knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
